name: Evidence File Deletion
description: Detects bulk file deletion or secure delete operations indicative of evidence destruction
query:
// Detect evidence destruction via bulk file deletion
// Trigger on sdelete, shred, or bulk rm operations
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(sdelete|cipher\s+/w|shred\s+-[fvzu]|wipe|bleachbit|del\s+/[sfq].*\*)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
